Product_Name: ECOFLOW Extra Battery for DELTA 2 Max Portable Power Station, 2048Wh Capacity
Category: Home > Garden & Outdoors > Generators & Portable Power > Generators
Review_Text:
I bought the additional battery to go with my Delta 2 Max and four solar panels. Setting up is very straight forward and the connect cable is easy to use. The Delta 2 Max instantly recognizes the battery and it even shows on the Eco Flow app. I connected both to my solar panels and charged them to 100% as I was curious to see how they would balance out as the new battery arrived at 60% charge and my Delta 2 Max was at 75%. Charging was quick from my solar panels as the Delta 2 Max shunted much of the power to the extra battery until they were both at the same charge level and then the load evened out. I think it’s a great addition as now I can generate and store 4 KW hours of power. My plan is to add a second smart battery so as to max out at 6 KW hours.

The smart battery weighs almost 10 pounds less than the Delta 2 Max and is easy to move around. It’s size allows for easy storage in a on top of the D2 Max.

Honestly, I was a bit nervous ordering such an expensive laptop online, but this turned out to be a great experience. The laptop arrived factory sealed, looked completely brand new, and everything matched the description exactly. The performance has been smooth and fast, the OLED touchscreen display is beautiful, and the stylus support works really well. I’ve been using it for some days now and I’m genuinely happy with the purchase.

Big thanks to ASUS EXPERIENCE for delivering exactly what was promised. Based on my experience, they are a trustworthy seller and I would confidently recommend them.

Review_Text: It is light, easy to setup except the band that holds both grill covers together. I had to get someone to help me position the grill covers in place (before screwing). Asides that, either it seems like I arranged it wrongly or it is designed not to appear straight. If you prefer things aligned straight, you may face the challenge of the fan head (grill cover) not aligned with the button section when it is off & also the "Binatone" cover/label on the front of the grill cover is not aligned well. Asides these little nuances, it's a great fan. It is truly 1.6Metres tall, but can be adjusted down, you can also adjust the grill cover for the fan to blow almost vertically/upwards instead of the default horizontal standard. I bought it because it's rated 50W and has 2years warranty.
